arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man City face 'never before seen' situation in Wirtz battle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich would be willing to go into debt to secure the signing of Florian Wirtz, according to honorary president Uli Hoeness. Nevertheless, Wirtz continues to be the subject of rampant transfer speculation, with Arsenal, Man City and, chief among them, Bayern Munich perpetually linked with him.

arts.ttl: Fresh Jack Grealish injury doubt vs Plymouth sums up the Man City dilemma that has no solution
arts.sum: Jack Grealish is a fitness doubt for Manchester City's FA Cup clash with Plymouth as Pep Guardiola admitted 'question marks' over his injury record.

arts.ttl: Why Jack Grealish is in danger of running out of chances at Man City - and what the £100m star can do to get back to his best at the Etihad, writes JACK GAUGHAN
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: This was supposed to be the reset, the turning of a page, the season Grealish returned to being Grealish. Last year, the post-Treble comedown, was effectively a write-off.

arts.ttl: Man City 'handed Florian Wirtz setback' as Bayern Munich position becomes clear
arts.sum: Karl-Heinz Rummenigge confirms Bayern Munich's interest in signing Manchester City-linked Florian Wirtz from reigning Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: AC Milan confirm willingness to sell Man City & Real Madrid target
arts.sum: AC Milan director Geoffrey Moncada has confirmed the club are prepared to sell left-back Theo Hernandez this summer if he does not extend his contract. Serie A newcomers Como offered around €40m to sign Theo in January and Milan were prepared to accept the offer, but the 27-year-old rejected the move and instead chose to see out the season with the Rossoneri.
